006package com.stuypulse.robot;
007
008import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.DoNothingAuton;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.LBDisrupt;
010import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.LBFerry;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.RBDisrupt;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.RBFerry;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.depot.CenterDepot;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.FrontHubShootPreloads;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.LBDumpy;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.shooting.RBDumpy;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.compound.StopShooting;
018import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetForward;
019import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetReverse;
020import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetForward;
021import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeAgitateFastOnce;
022import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIdle;
023import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIntake;
024import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetOuttake;
025import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.leds.LEDDefaultCommand;
026import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterAddToBonusVelocity;
027import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterFirstShotIncrease;
028import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterResetBonusVelocity;
029import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetFerry;
030import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetManual;
031import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetShoot;
032import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterWaitForSpinUp;
033import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveDrive;
034import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveResetRotation;
035import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveXMode;
036import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone;
037import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToHub;
038import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Field;
039import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
040import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.feeder.Feeder;
041import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.handoff.Handoff;
042import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake.Intake;
043import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.leds.LEDController;
044import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter;
045import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
046import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.vision.LimelightVision;
047import com.stuypulse.robot.util.PathUtil.AutonConfig;
048
049import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SendableChooser;
050import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SmartDashboard;
051import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
052import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.WaitCommand;
053import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController;
054import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.Trigger;
055
056/**
057 * <h2>Robot Container Class</h2>
058 * 
059 * This class is where the bulk of the robot should be declared. Since Command-based is a
060 * "declarative" paradigm, very little robot logic should actually be handled in the {@link Robot}
061 * periodic methods (other than the scheduler calls). Instead, the structure of the robot (including
062 * subsystems, commands, and trigger mappings) should be declared here.
063 */
064public class RobotContainer {
065
066    // Gamepads
067    public final CommandXboxController driver = new CommandXboxController(Ports.Gamepad.DRIVER);
068
069    // Subsystem
070    private final Feeder feeder = Feeder.getInstance();
071
072    private final Intake intake = Intake.getInstance();
073
074    private final Shooter shooter = Shooter.getInstance();
075
076    private final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
077
078    private final LimelightVision vision = LimelightVision.getInstance();
079
080    private final LEDController leds = LEDController.getInstance();
081
082    private final Handoff handoff = Handoff.getInstance();
083
084    // Autons
085    private static SendableChooser<Command> autonChooser = new SendableChooser<>();
086
087    // Robot container
088
089    /** The container for the robot. Contains subsystems, OI devices, and commands. */
090    public RobotContainer() {
091        swerve.configureAutoBuilder();
092        configureDefaultCommands();
093        configureButtonBindings();
094        configureAutons();
095        SmartDashboard.putData("Field", Field.FIELD2D);
096    }
097
098    /** ************ */
099    /** DEFAULTS ** */
100    /** ************ */
101    private void configureDefaultCommands() {
102        swerve.setDefaultCommand(new SwerveDriveDrive(driver));
103        leds.setDefaultCommand(new LEDDefaultCommand());
104    }
105
106    /***************/
107    /*** BUTTONS ***/
108    /***************/
109
110    /**
111     * This method is used to configure button bindings for controlling the robot.
112   */
113    private void configureButtonBindings() {
114        // Trigger buttons did not work for some reason so I had to do this
115        Trigger leftTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getLeftTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
116        Trigger rightTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getRightTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
117
118        leftTrigger.onTrue(new IntakeSetIntake());
119        driver.leftBumper().whileTrue(new IntakeSetOuttake());
120
121        driver.leftBumper().onFalse(new IntakeSetIntake());
122
123        rightTrigger.whileTrue(
124                new WaitCommand(1.5).raceWith(new SwerveDriveAlignToHub())
125                .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
126                .andThen(new ShooterSetShoot())
127                .andThen(new FeederSetReverse())
128                .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp().withDeadline(new WaitCommand(1)))
129                .andThen(new HandoffSetForward()
130                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(),
131                        new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly(),
132                        new ShooterFirstShotIncrease())));
133        rightTrigger.onFalse(
134            new StopShooting()
135        );
136
137        // Top Left Paddle
138        driver.y().onTrue(new IntakeSetIdle());
139        
140        driver.rightBumper()
141            .whileTrue(
142                new WaitCommand(1.5).raceWith(new SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone())
143                    .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
144                    .andThen(new ShooterSetFerry())
145                    .andThen(new FeederSetReverse())
146                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
147                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward()
148                        .alongWith(
149                            new FeederSetForward(),
150                            new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly(),
151                            new ShooterFirstShotIncrease())));
152        driver.rightBumper()
153            .onFalse(
154                new StopShooting()
155            );
156        // Manual shooting possibly from in front of the tower
157        driver.a()
158            .whileTrue(
159                new SwerveDriveXMode()
160                    .andThen(new ShooterSetManual())
161                    .andThen(new FeederSetReverse())
162                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
163                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward()
164                        .alongWith(
165                            new FeederSetForward(),
166                            new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly(),
167                            new ShooterFirstShotIncrease())));
168        driver.a()
169            .onFalse(
170                new StopShooting()
171            );
172
173        driver.b()  
174            .whileTrue(
175                new SwerveDriveXMode()
176                    .andThen(new ShooterSetShoot())
177                    .andThen(new FeederSetReverse())
178                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
179                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward()
180                    .alongWith(
181                        new FeederSetForward(),
182                        new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly(),
183                        new ShooterFirstShotIncrease()))
184            );
185        driver.b()
186            .onFalse(
187                new StopShooting()
188            );
189
190        // Bottom Left Paddle
191        driver.x().whileTrue(new SwerveDriveXMode());
192
193        driver.povLeft().onTrue(new SwerveDriveResetRotation());
194        
195        // driver.povUp()
196        //     .onTrue(new ShooterAddToBonusVelocity(50));
197        // driver.povDown()
198        //     .onTrue(new ShooterAddToBonusVelocity(-50));
199        // driver.povRight()
200        //     .onTrue(new ShooterResetBonusVelocity());
201
202    }
203
204    /**************/
205    /*** AUTONS ***/
206    /**************/
207
208    /**
209     * This method is used to configure the autonomous commands.
210     */
211     public void configureAutons() {
212        autonChooser.addOption("Do Nothing", new DoNothingAuton());
213        // SHOOT
214
215        AutonConfig centerDepot = new AutonConfig("Center Depot", CenterDepot::new,
216            "Hub to Depot",
217            "Tower shoot");
218        centerDepot.register(autonChooser);
219
220        AutonConfig frontHubShootPreloads = new AutonConfig("Front Hub Shoot Preloads", FrontHubShootPreloads::new,
221            "Front Hub Shoot Preloads"
222        );
223        frontHubShootPreloads.register(autonChooser);
224
225        AutonConfig LB_Dumpy = new AutonConfig("LB Dumpy", LBDumpy::new,
226            "LB to N Dumpy",
227            "LB Intake Dumpy",
228            "LB Backsweep Dumpy",
229            "LB Shoot Dumpy",
230            "LB Shoot to Depot");
231        LB_Dumpy.register(autonChooser);
232
233        AutonConfig RB_Dumpy = new AutonConfig("RB Dumpy", RBDumpy::new, 
234            "RB to N Dumpy",
235            "RB Intake Dumpy",
236            "RB Backsweep Dumpy",
237            "RB Shoot Dumpy"
238        );
239        RB_Dumpy.register(autonChooser);
240
241        // FERRY
242        AutonConfig LB_Ferry = new AutonConfig("LB Disrupt", LBFerry::new, 
243            "LB to N Ferry",
244            "N to LT Ferry",
245            "LT Hub Ferry",
246            "N to Depot Ferry"
247        );
248        LB_Ferry.register(autonChooser);
249
250        AutonConfig RB_Ferry = new AutonConfig("LB Disrupt", RBFerry::new, 
251            "RB to N Ferry",
252            "N to RT Ferry",
253            "RT Hub Ferry",
254            "N to Outpost Ferry"
255        );
256        RB_Ferry.register(autonChooser);
257
258        // DISRUPT
259        AutonConfig LB_Disrupt = new AutonConfig("LB Disrupt", LBDisrupt::new, 
260            "LB to CN Disrupt",
261            "LN Disrupt Circle",
262            "LN Disrupt Circle",
263            "LB Disrupt Return"
264        );
265        LB_Disrupt.register(autonChooser);
266
267        AutonConfig RB_Disrupt = new AutonConfig("RB Disrupt", RBDisrupt::new, 
268            "RB to CN Disrupt",
269            "RN Circle Disrupt",
270            "RN Circle Disrupt",
271            "RB Disrupt Return"
272        );
273        RB_Disrupt.register(autonChooser);
274
275        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Forwards",
276        // swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kForward));
277        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Backwards",
278        // swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
279        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Forwards",
280        // swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kForward));
281        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Backwards",
282        // swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kReverse));
283        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Forwards",
284        // swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kForward));
285        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Backwards",
286        // swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
287        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Forwards",
288        // swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kForward));
289        // autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Backwards",
290        // swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kReverse));
291        SmartDashboard.putData("Autonomous", autonChooser);
292    }
293
294    /**
295     * Use this to pass the autonomous command to the main {@link Robot} class.
296     * @return The command to run in autonomous
297     */
298    public Command getAutonomousCommand() {
299        return autonChooser.getSelected();
300    }
301}
